name: Brand Tracker
summary: Weekly web & community tracking of brand / keyword mentions, with a live feed and optional AI sentiment.
description: Track mentions of your brand or keywords across Google web + news, Hacker News, and Reddit on a weekly schedule. Configure once in a form; the plugin provisions a managed Script, secrets, a data store, and a weekly schedule, dedupes results across sources, and shows a live mention feed. Optional AI enrichment (platform Claude or OpenRouter) tags each mention with source type and sentiment.
author: Hasan Aboul Hasan
